# Sync ROADMAP to the graduated cockpit-UX epic #13448

## Context

`ROADMAP.md` (next-only reshape merged via #13447 / closing #13403) carries a **⚠️ gating-core-decision callout** and critical-path references that were written while the harness-UI definition was still converging in [Discussion #13436](https://github.com/orgs/neomjs/discussions/13436). #13436 has since **graduated** into [Epic #13448](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/13448) (the cockpit-UX / harness-UI definition — keeper views · nav · human/agent caps). The ROADMAP's own callout promised: *"the roadmap updates again once it is delivered."* That trigger has now fired — this ticket is that promised update.

## The Problem

Three surfaces in the merged `ROADMAP.md` are now stale (V-B-A'd against `origin/dev:ROADMAP.md`, 2026-06-17):

- **L17 — the ⚠️ gating-core-decision callout:** still says the harness-UI definition is *"not yet made"* and *"Until a top-level harness-UI-definition epic lands that definition, the nodes below risk random work."* #13448 **is** that epic, and it landed — so the gate is resolved, not pending.
- **L26 — Cockpit UX/IA node:** references *"cockpit-UX epic (graduating from Discussion #13436)"* with state *"converging."* It graduated; the reference should point at #13448 with a live in-progress state.
- **L27 — Beautiful design node:** references *"cockpit-UX epic — Design lane (#13436 Fork D)."* Should point at #13448.

Left stale, the ROADMAP contradicts the graph — the callout warns of an undefined product that is now defined in #13448 — exactly the drift the `update-roadmap` discipline (#13380) exists to prevent.

## The Architectural Reality

`ROADMAP.md` is the **next-release-scope-only** surface (per #13403 + the `update-roadmap` skill #13380): it points at the milestone + cornerstone epics, it does not duplicate them. So the fix **points** the stale references at #13448 and flips the gating-callout from "not yet made" to "delivered as #13448" — rather than copying #13448's keeper-view detail inline. The **fuller mirror** of #13448's keeper-view set (Welcome / Accounts / Fleet / Chat / live-pane views, nav, human/agent caps) into the ROADMAP is deferred until #13448's per-view sub-tickets land with their DoDs (see Out of Scope).

## The Fix

In `ROADMAP.md`:

- **L17 callout:** reframe from "⚠️ the gating core decision — not yet made" to a resolved state — the harness-UI definition is now delivered as Epic #13448 (keeper views · nav · human/agent caps); the critical-path nodes hang under #13448's keeper-view subs as they land. Keep one line noting the per-view DoD detail mirrors into the ROADMAP once #13448's subs are created.
- **L26 / L27:** replace the `#13436` / "graduating" references with `Epic #13448`; update the Cockpit-UX/IA state from "converging" to the live epic state.

No other ROADMAP content changes.

## Decision Record impact

`none` — docs sync; `aligned-with` the `update-roadmap` discipline (#13380) and the #13448 graduation. No ADR.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` L17 callout reflects the harness-UI definition as **delivered (Epic #13448)**, not "not yet made."
- [ ] The critical-path Cockpit-UX/IA + Beautiful-design rows reference **Epic #13448** (not Discussion #13436 / "graduating").
- [ ] The ROADMAP still **points at** #13448 rather than duplicating its keeper-view detail (next-only discipline preserved).
- [ ] A one-line note states the per-view DoD detail mirrors into the ROADMAP once #13448's keeper-view subs land.
- [ ] Cross-family review + the human merge gate.

## Out of Scope

- The **fuller mirror** of #13448's keeper-view set (the actual view list, nav model, human/agent caps) into the ROADMAP — deferred until #13448's per-view sub-tickets land with DoDs. This ticket points at #13448; it does not copy its contents.
- Any change to #13448 itself, the VISION (that is #13449 / PR #13450), or the milestone.

## Related

- Follows #13403 (the next-only ROADMAP reshape, merged via #13447).
- Reflects the graduation of [Discussion #13436](https://github.com/orgs/neomjs/discussions/13436) → Epic #13448.
- Sibling positioning surface: #13449 / PR #13450 (VISION v14 framing).
- Discipline: `update-roadmap` skill #13380.

Release classification: boardless docs/substrate sync — not v13.1 release-blocking.
